title: [Griffin's Keen, Inner Trail]
description: The valley below is not much more than a ravine cut through snow and ice, but it seems a much better place to be than this precipitous, wind-swept trail.  The sloped outer edge of the path could easily claim the most careful climber.

wayto.4005: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
wayto.4609: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'up'
